title: boehmeria celtidifolia
intro: Boehmeria celtidifolia, also known as 'Dongling Cao' or 'False nettle', is a perennial plant native to Asia and part of the Urticaceae family. The leaves and stems of this plant contain various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Boehmeria celtidifolia include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and soothing digestive issues. Boehmeria celtidifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
